anime.title: Naruto
anime.shortReview: Classic ninja journey with strong character growth.

anime.title: One Piece
anime.shortReview: A long pirate adventure with great world-building.

anime.title: Attack on Titan
anime.shortReview: Intense plot with major twists and strong storytelling.

anime.title: Demon Slayer
anime.shortReview: Beautiful animation and emotional character moments.

anime.title: Death Note
anime.shortReview: A smart psychological battle between Light and L.
